name: VF 100 Village Bucket Filter
description: VF 100 Village Bucket Filter is a hollow fiber membrane filter that attaches to a bucket of water.

taxonomy.sub_category: VF 100 Village Bucket Filter Updated on January 2, 2024 · Created on September 27, 2018 VF 100 Village Bucket Filter VF 100 Village Bucket Filter is a hollow fiber membrane filter that attaches to a bucket of water. Developed By Village Water Filters, Inc. Tested By Biological consulting services lab, University of South Florida Centre for Affordable Water and Sanitation Technologies (CAWST) Content Partners Centre for Affordable Water and Sanitation Technologies (CAWST) Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description VF 100 Village Bucket Filter Kit has a 0.1-micron hollow membrane filter which removes bacteria, virus and protozoa. The filter kit assembly is simple and can be used with any plastic basket or plastic bottle. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 3: Good Health and Well-Being Market Suggested Retail Price $35.00 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household, NGOs Distributors / Implementing Organizations Village Water FIlters Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include Aqusafe Filters , WateROAM ROAMfilter Lite , and Sawyer PointOne Filter . Manufacturing/Building Method The filter element is manufactured by NOK of Japan. All filters are assembled in Silverthorne, Colorado by the staff of volunteers of Village Water Filters. Intellectural Property Type Select Type User Provision Model Users can purchase the product directly from Business Connect. Distributions to Date Status Unknown Target use case Community use Manufacturer-specified flow rate (L/hr) ~45 (1 gallon per 5 mins) Bacteria reduction Unknown Type of membrane filtration Microfiltration Virus reduction 0.6-2 log Protozoa reduction 4 log Heavy metals and/or arsenic reduction Unknown Maximum recommended influent turbidity level (NTU) Unknown Effluent turbidity levels (NTU) Unknown Material of construction Plastic Safe water storage capacity (L) Depends on the size of the bucket used (Usually 20 L) Manufacturer-specified lifetime volume (L) 500,000 L Design Specifications The 0.1 micron absolute filter removes bacteria, protozoa and cysts. The product is designed to be simple with easy maintenance. It can be used with any plastic bucket or plastic bottle or even attached to a spigot with hose threads. Product Schematics Technical Support Instruction manuals for the filter assembly, filter backflushing, pre-filter cleaning and pre & post filter surveys are available online. For additional technical support, contact Village Water Filters. Replacement Components None Lifecycle Life of the filter is dependent on the turbidity of water and degree of operation maintenance. Use of a prefilter will extend its life. Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters The manufacturer aims to design simple and easy-to-use filters. However, the filter is not designed to remove dissolved solids, including chemicals and heavy metals. Vetted Performance Status VF 100 VIllage Bucket Filter has been tested in laboratory and field. Safety Regular cleaning and operational maintenance is necessary for optimal functional and life span of the product. Complementary Technical Systems A plastic bucket or a plastic bottle, Village pre-filter Academic Research and References “Village Water Filters,” Village Water Filters Inc., 26-Feb-2018. Available: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f1ZGhBtpMIQ “Special Training for NGOs,” Village Water Filters Inc., 29-Apr-2015. Available: https://villagewaterfilters.org/training-for-ngos/ Compliance with regulations The filter removes bacteria and protozoa to meet the EPA water standards Evaluation methods The water filtered through the product is evaluated in a laboratory for biological contamination: enterovirus, protozoa (Cryptosporidium oocysts and Giardia cysts) and bacteria (Raoultella terrigena and HPC). The product is also evaluated in HIF Emergency Household Water Filter Challenge on the basis of ease of use, performance in different scenarios and logistics. Other Information Videos on the product installation instructions , the technology in the product, and NGO training provided by Village Water Filters.
